subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and who hath attained unto Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و قد حضر بین یدینا
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital
